case_title: TAN, XING LU et al vs. DEBOER, SHERRY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, XING LU MENG, YU MING SHEN, LUN AS TO DEFENDANT DEBOER, SHERRY STASIONWSKI, LLOYD F SUEDAS STASTOWSKI LLOYD F YAN, HOMER DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-01-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-09-1995

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, XING LU MENG, YU MING SHEN, LUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBOER, SHERRY $7,050.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,050.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS VS DEBOER AND EACH PARTY THEIR OWN COSTS VS STASIOWSKI. COSTS TO DEFT YAN VS. PLAINTIFFS. DEBOER TO PAY PLAINTIFFS $2650 TO TAN, $1700 TO MENG, AND $2700 TO SHEN. CLAIM AS TO DEFT TAN IS DENIED.
